final:
module RefModule(e, d, q, q_not);input wire e, d;              
   output reg q, q_not;          

     wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge e or posedge dbg_halt) begin     
      q = d;                     
      q_not = ~d;                
   end
endmodule
